creator: Nikita Fair
source_text:
Crispy Buffalo Chicken Mac & Cheese 🧀
(Makes 10 Servings) 

Macros Per Serving: 
- 450 Calories
- 55g Protein 
- 45g Carbs 
- 6g Fat 

📕 Comment “Meal Prep” and I will DM you a purchase link to my Meal Prep Cookbook with 100+ recipes just like this!

Ingredients (Crispy Chicken)🍗: 
- 60oz Chicken Breast (1700g)
- 2 Cups Flour (240g)
- 2 Tbsps Garlic Salt (30g)
- 1 Tbsp Cayenne Pepper (6g)
- 1 Tbsp Black Pepper (7g)
- 2 Cups Egg Whites (480g)
- 0.25 Cup Pickle Juice (60g)
- 3 Tbsps Hot Sauce (45g)
- 3 Cups Corn Flakes (150g)
- 1 Cup Low Calorie Buffalo Sauce (240g)

Ingredients (Mac & Cheese)🧀: 
- 2.5 Cups Cottage Cheese (0% Fat) (560g)
- 2 Mac & Cheese Powder Packets (56g)
- 3oz Reduced Fat Cream Cheese (85g)
- 0.5 Tbsp Onion Powder (3g)
- 0.5 Tbsp Black Pepper (3g)
- 0.75 Cup Fat Free Milk (180g)
- 20oz Dry Protein Pasta (565g) 

Freezing Instructions ❄️:
1. Portion out 1/10 of the final dish into each air-tight meal prep container
2. Place them in the freezer and keep frozen for up to 3 months

Reheating Instructions🔥: 
1. Take out a frozen containers, remove the lid, and add 1-2 Tbsps of water to the frozen pasta
2. Cover the container with a wet paper towel 
3. Microwave for around 5-6 minutes, mixing half-way through
notes: Agent-labeled from the frozen Instagram description before viewing parser output.
Only freezing and reheating directions are present; the primary preparation method is absent.
Accepted exactly with the existing creator-independent parser; no parser change was needed.
